---
title: "Assistant Professor"
image: "images/avatar.jpg"
color1: "#5A59A3"
color2: "#C66060"
angle: 130
links:
    - label: '`r fontawesome::fa("github")`'
      url: "https://github.com/Cdishop"
    - label: '`r fontawesome::fa("graduation-cap")`'
      url: "https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=VSTAif8AAAAJ&hl=en&oi=ao"
output:
  postcards::onofre
site: distill::distill_website
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)

# Learn more about creating websites with Distill at:
# https://rstudio.github.io/distill/website.html

```

I lead the RocMob at Auburn University, a research group focused on cooperation and organizational behavior in modern work environments. Organizational theory on cooperation was developed by studying in-person, manufacturing-style work arrangements. The RocMob examines how contemporary work environments (e.g., remote jobs, asynchronous teamwork, algorithms and AI-supported teams) influence employees’ abilities to cooperate, support one another, and remain productive.

<a href="https://cdishop.github.io/rocmob.github.io/" target="_blank" style="display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 10px 18px; border: 2px solid white; border-radius: 12px; text-decoration: none; color: white; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; transition: background 0.2s, color 0.2s;" onmouseover="this.style.background='white'; this.style.color='#6b5b95';" onmouseout="this.style.background='transparent'; this.style.color='white';">RocMob</a>
